_meta.note: S204 supplement: the one missing link found at live-probe — the Shipbreaker Bay fight was causally unlinked from Lucerys's death, dead-ending the Driftmark thread before Blood and Cheese. Orchestrator-verified with text open (L1: single-chapter, undisputed per Munkun/Gyldayn).

edges.quote: Arrax fell, broken, to be swallowed by the storm-lashed waters of the bay.
edges.note: S204 supplement: the dragon-fight above Shipbreaker Bay immediately kills Arrax and Lucerys (Munkun: 'Lucerys Velaryon died with his dragon' — Gyldayn endorses as undoubtedly correct).
